caption: The video shows a presentation slide titled "Linde – Hampson System" under the header "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING." The slide features a temperature-entropy (T-S) diagram on the left and a corresponding system schematic on the right. The T-S diagram includes plotted curves labeled "p=const" and "h=const," with numbered points from 1 to 4. The schematic depicts components such as a "Makeup gas" inlet, a heat exchanger, and a valve, with flow indicators labeled "(m-m_1)" and "m_1." An NPTEL logo is visible in the bottom left corner, and a footer reads "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay." Throughout the frames, a small cursor appears and moves across the right side of the slide, shifting its position from the heat exchanger toward the lower valve and then slightly back, indicating a pointer being used to highlight specific parts of the system.
